title: Fi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Fi''' can be more than one thing:

*'''''[[Silooth (Star Destroyer)|Fi]]''''' was the name of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Peccati Syn]]'s flagship.

*'''[[Fi (clone trooper)|Fi]]''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who was killed at [[Skirmish at Dinlo|Dinlo]].

*'''Fi''' was also the nickname of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[RC-8015]].

*"'''[[Fi (High Galactic)|Fi]]'''" was also a [[High Galactic (language)|High Galactic]] term used by [[Sacred Way/Legends|Sacred Way]] clergymen.

{{Disambig}}
